"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const useRouterState = require("./useRouterState.cjs"); function useLocation(opts) { return useRouterState.useRouterState({ select: (state) => opts?.select ? opts.select(state.location) : state.location }); } exports.useLocation = useLocation; //# sourceMappingURL=useLocation.cjs.map
